case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. DONNA VIOLI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS {C.C.P. 1033} (TRANSACTION ID # 100113943) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT {CCP 585} (TRANSACTION ID # 100113943) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100089775) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT VIOLI, DONNA AKA DONNA M VIOLI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIOLI, DONNA AKA DONNA M VIOLI $2,022.14 PRINCIPAL, $351.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,373.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100113943)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT VIOLI, DONNA AKA DONNA M VIOLI DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-21-2020
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 64187029), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK SERVED AUG-19-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VIOLI, DONNA AKA DONNA M VIOLI
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-26-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $351.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1.90 (TRANSACTION ID # 100113943) AS TO DEFENDANT VIOLI, DONNA AKA DONNA M VIOLI
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100113943) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-26-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
